content: Create TypeScript types for portfolio editing (Portfolio, Holding, ChangeLog)
Create portfolioEditorStore.ts with Zustand for state management
Build PortfolioMetricsSummary.tsx with real-time metrics and visual indicators
Build BulkEditToolbar.tsx with multi-select and bulk actions
Build EditHoldingDrawer.tsx with slide-out drawer and validation
Build ChangeHistoryLog.tsx with audit trail and undo capability
Build HoldingsManager.tsx with full CRUD, search, filter, and bulk operations
Create PortfolioEditPage.tsx composing all portfolio components
Add Zustand dependency and route for portfolio edit page
Test portfolio editing components and verify functionality
